content.content:
{"body":"* **GO term ID and label for which you request a new superclass**

GO:0072318  clathrin coat disassembly
The disaggregation of a clathrin coat into its constituent components; results in stripping or removing the clathrin coat from clathrin-coated vesicles (CCV) before fusing with their targets. CVVs transport cargo from plasma membrane and trans-Golgi to the endosomal system. 


* **New superclass (parent) suggested**

GO:0072583  clathrin-dependent endocytosis

* **Reference(s), if appropriate**

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0072318
name: clathrin coat disassembly
namespace: biological_process
def: "The disaggregation of a clathrin coat into its constituent components; results in stripping or removing the clathrin coat from clathrin-coated vesicles (CCV) before fusing with their targets. CVVs transport cargo from plasma membrane and trans-Golgi to the endosomal system." [PMID:11084334, PMID:11146663, PMID:8524399]
synonym: "clathrin-coat disassembly" EXACT [GOC:rb]
synonym: "clathrin-coat uncoating" EXACT [GOC:rb]
synonym: "clathrin-coated vesicle uncoating" EXACT [GOC:mah]
is_a: GO:0072319 ! vesicle uncoating
intersection_of: GO:0022411 ! cellular component disassembly
intersection_of: results_in_disassembly_of GO:0030118 ! clathrin coat
created_by: mah
creation_date: 2010-10-26T12:03:37Z

content.content:
[Term]
id: GO:0072583
name: clathrin-dependent endocytosis
namespace: biological_process
def: "An endocytosis process that begins when material is taken up into clathrin-coated pits, which then pinch off to form clathrin-coated endocytic vesicles." [GOC:BHF, GOC:mah, PMID:18498251, PMID:8970738, PMID:9234965]
synonym: "clathrin coated pit-dependent endocytosis" EXACT [GOC:BHF]
synonym: "clathrin-mediated endocytosis" EXACT []
synonym: "CME" EXACT [PMID:20074057]
is_a: GO:0006898 ! receptor-mediated endocytosis
created_by: mah
creation_date: 2011-02-08T03:59:18Z

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Add part_of clathrin-dependent endocytosis to GO:0072318 (fixes #31981)" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Addresses #31981: adds the missing parent and term tracker ID for **GO:0072318 clathrin coat disassembly**.

Changes:
- Adds `relationship: part_of GO:0072583 ! clathrin-dependent endocytosis`
- Adds `property_value: term_tracker_item \"https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31981\" xsd:anyURI`

## Rationale

The existing parent term **GO:0072319 vesicle uncoating** already has `part_of GO:0016192 vesicle-mediated transport`. Clathrin coat disassembly is the uncoating step within clathrin-dependent endocytosis, so `part_of` (rather than `is_a`) is the appropriate relationship — mirroring the pattern of the parent term and reflecting the biology (uncoating is one step in the endocytic process, not a kind of endocytosis).

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION (passed before edits)
- [x] RESEARCH — N/A, well-established cell biology and the request specifies the parent
- [x] TERM-SEARCH — confirmed GO:0072318 and GO:0072583 stanzas
- [x] DESIGN-PATTERNS — follows pattern of sibling/parent uncoating terms (`part_of` to enclosing transport process)
- [x] EDITS — used obo-checkout/checkin via `terms/`
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS — `part_of` chosen rather than `is_a`; existing `is_a` (vesicle uncoating) and logical definition unchanged
- [x] METADATA — added `term_tracker_item`; `created_by`/`creation_date` left untouched (existing term)
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION — `make travis_build` passes (all SPARQL-QC, reasoning, and post-reason checks)
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION — N/A, no new references
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED

---

- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @ValWood
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25039245202)
EOF
)"
